response.justification: Bogdan possesses an exceptional depth and breadth of experience, significantly exceeding the 6+ years requirement. His background as a "software craftsman" with strong full-stack skills in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, coupled with direct experience in AI agent infrastructure and cloud technologies like AWS and Kubernetes, makes him an outstanding candidate.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (10+ years) with primary stack technologies (TS, Node.js, React).
Direct experience with AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
Demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship, TDD, and architectural quality.
concerns: Nest.js experience not explicitly mentioned in the resume.
Specific experience with PostgreSQL is not detailed.
Breadth of experience across many languages/domains might hint at less depth in one specific area.

key_factors.factor: Primary stack alignment (TS, Node, React, Cloud, Containers)
